items.name: ix
items.description: Siemens Industrial Experience is a design system for designers and developers, to consistently create the perfect digital experience for industrial software products.

items.name: awesome-design-systems
items.description: 📒 A curated list of bookmarks, resources and articles about design systems focused on developers.

items.name: baklava
items.description: Baklava is a design system provided by Trendyol to create a consistent UI/UX for app users.

items.name: dembrandt
items.description: Extract any website’s design system into tokens in seconds: logo, colors, typography, borders & more. One command.

items.name: sprucecss
items.description: An open-source, lightweight and modern CSS framework, design system built on Sass. Give your project a solid foundation.

items.name: Flame-Code-VLM
items.description: Flame is an open-source multimodal AI system designed to translate UI design mockups into high-quality React code. It leverages vision-language modeling, automated data synthesis, and structured training workflows to bridge the gap between design and front-end development.

items.name: design-system-react
items.description: Salesforce Lightning Design System for React

items.name: govuk_frontend_toolkit
items.description: ❗️GOV.UK Frontend Toolkit is deprecated. Use the GOV.UK Design System instead.
